training_status: recreational, treadmill/rowing 45 min 2x/week, weights 2x/week at home

benefits.description: Feels much better overall; lost significant weight (HW 249, CW 187)

side_effects.description: Still experiencing tiredness despite weight loss and semaglutide use

protocol_notes: Started semaglutide in April 2023. HW 249 lbs, CW 187 lbs, GW 155 lbs. Concerned about loose skin, lack of muscle mass, and increased signs of aging. Frequent bloodwork done; all good except chronic anemia. Sleeps 6-7 hrs weekdays, 8+ weekends.
